strong_matches: Automation & scripting: Proven use of Python and Excel VBA to build analytics and reporting for trading/mid-office workflows (multiple roles).
Systems integration & data mapping: Experience integrating ETRM systems with market data and accounting systems, producing designs and SQL data mappings.
Project leadership & testing: Led ETRM enhancement projects, authored design/UAT materials, and coordinated stakeholders for implementation.
skill_gaps: No evidence of hands-on Java / J2EE development (explicitly listed as 'Extensive Java & J2EE' required).
No evidence of API development (designing/implementing REST/HTTP APIs).
No demonstrated CI/CD pipeline experience (Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitLab CI) or automation of secure build pipelines.
No explicit Git / source control workflow experience described (branching, pull requests, repo maintenance).
No Ansible or other configuration management experience.
No Azure cloud platform experience or cloud-native deployments mentioned.
No Venafi, SSH key discovery/management, PowerShell scripting for key discovery, or certificate management experience.
No IAM / Identity & Access Management engineering experience (MFA, SSO, RBAC, privileged access).
screening_questions: Do you have any hands-on Java / J2EE development experience? Provide recent projects, years of experience, and code responsibilities.
Have you designed or implemented REST APIs? If yes, which frameworks and tooling did you use?
Describe any CI/CD pipelines you have built or maintained (tools, responsibilities, and examples).
Do you have experience with Docker or container orchestration (Kubernetes)? Give examples.
Are you experienced with Git in a professional environment (branching strategy, PR reviews, repositories)?
Have you used Ansible or other configuration management tools in automation projects?
Do you have Azure experience (services used, deployment, IaC)?
Any exposure to Venafi, SSH key lifecycle management, PowerShell for agentless discovery, or certificate management?
resume_improvements: If any DevOps/engineering exposure exists (even limited), explicitly list tools, projects, and responsibilities (Java, APIs, CI/CD, Docker, Git, Ansible, Azure) with dates and outcomes.
Quantify and clarify Python production usage: mention frameworks, deployment context, whether scripts run in CI/CD or automated jobs, and integration points (APIs, databases).
Add a clear 'Technical Skills' section grouped by Development, DevOps/Cloud, Scripting, and Data to make any overlapping/transferable skills more visible to technical hiring managers.
supplier_comments: Senior ETRM professional with 20 years and deep energy trading/risk management expertise; strong in analytics, Python/VBA automation, and ETRM system integrations. However, the role requires hands-on Java, API development, CI/CD, Docker, Azure and Venafi/SSH key management—areas not evidenced on the resume, so I do not recommend submission.
